top_jd_skills: CI/CD Pipeline (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, TeamCity, Octopus)
strong_matches: Azure platform expertise: designed and deployed Azure infrastructure (VMs, App Services, AKS, Azure SQL, Azure Functions), used ARM templates, Terraform, Azure DevOps and Azure Automation.
CI/CD pipelines: extensive hands-on building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, TeamCity, Azure DevOps/VSTS, Octopus Deploy and Git-based workflows for containerized and JVM apps.
Containerization and orchestration: built and managed Docker containers, Helm charts, Kubernetes (AKS/EKS/KOPS/OpenShift) clusters and automated deployments to production.
Ansible automation: authored playbooks, roles, inventories and integrated Ansible into CI pipelines to provision and configure environments.
Git/version control: managed branches and integrations with CI systems; used GitHub and GitLab APIs and repositories in pipelines.
Privileged and SSH key management: implemented CyberArk PAM and Venafi SSH Protect, automated SSH key discovery, rotation, vaulting and integrated with AD and CI/CD processes.
Scripting for automation: developed PowerShell and Python scripts for identity lifecycle, SSH key inventory/rotation, Azure automation runbooks and deployment automation.
skill_gaps: Depth of Java/J2EE hands-on development: resume shows involvement in Java build/release and code reviews but limited evidence of extensive J2EE application development (controllers, services, frameworks like Spring).

Direct, demonstrable API development experience: some serverless API and microservices deployment experience exists, but limited explicit evidence of designing/implementing REST APIs, API contracts, or use of API frameworks in production.
IDE usage (VSCODE/IntelliJ) not called out: no explicit references to developing in IntelliJ or VS Code which are listed as mandatory in JD.

Agent-based/agentless scanning tooling experience (specific to SSH key discovery) beyond Venafi: while Venafi and SSH automation are present, explicit experience with agent-based vs agentless scanning tools and customizing PowerShell for agentless discovery is not strongly detailed.

Cryptography/SSH certificate lifecycle using Venafi SSH CA: resume mentions Venafi SSH Protect and SSH automation but limited explicit examples of managing SSH certificates and Venafi SSH CA workflows.
screening_questions: Describe your hands-on Java/J2EE development experience: number of years coding Java, frameworks used (e.g., Spring), and recent Java projects where you implemented business logic (not just build/release).
Give specific examples of APIs you developed: did you design/implement REST endpoints, API contracts, authentication/authorization, API Management integrations—which technologies were used?
Have you used IntelliJ or VS Code as your primary IDE? Provide examples of recent development work performed in these IDEs.

Detail your experience with Venafi SSH CA and agentless SSH key discovery: have you customized PowerShell scripts for agentless scans, and have you integrated Venafi with ServiceNow/CyberArk/AD for automation?
Are you willing/able to work onsite in San Antonio, TX for the contract period and what is your current authorization/availability?
resume_improvements: Move Java/J2EE contributions higher in the summary: quantify Java involvement (years) and list specific Java frameworks, modules or full-stack responsibilities (e.g., Spring MVC/Boot, REST controllers) where applicable.

Make API development explicit: add bullets that state REST API design/implementation, API contracts, authentication (OAuth/JWT), and API Management usage (if done) to align with the API Development requirement.
List IDE experience: add explicit mentions of IntelliJ IDEA and/or VS Code under skills or within relevant role bullets where code work was performed.

Expand Venafi/CyberArk bullets to call out concrete outcomes: e.g., number of SSH keys discovered, rotation cadence automated, integrations with ServiceNow/CyberArk, and reporting/audit capabilities implemented.

Condense and highlight CI/CD bullet points: emphasize pipeline ownership, technologies (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, TeamCity), and examples of automated security/gates used in the pipelines (e.g., secrets scanning, automated key rotation steps).

submission_skills.relevant_experience: Designed and managed Azure infrastructure across multiple roles (Target, PNC, Global Payments) including AKS, App Services, ARM/Terraform, Azure Functions and Azure DevOps pipelines.

submission_skills.skill: CI/CD Pipeline (Jenkins, TeamCity, Azure DevOps, Octopus)
submission_skills.relevant_experience: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, TeamCity, Azure DevOps and Octopus across Java and containerized microservices environments; integrated pipelines with testing and release automation.

submission_skills.skill: SSH Key & Privileged Access Management (Venafi SSH Protect, CyberArk)
submission_skills.relevant_experience: Implemented Venafi SSH Protect and CyberArk PAM, automated SSH key discovery, rotation and vaulting, integrated with AD and CI/CD pipelines and developed PowerShell automation for key lifecycle management.

supplier_comments: Strong Azure DevOps/DevSecOps engineer with proven experience implementing Venafi and CyberArk for SSH key lifecycle automation. Excellent CI/CD and container orchestration background; needs validation on depth of Java/J2EE and hands-on API development before submission. Will be a good fit for DevSecOps tasks after quick screening.
